hero.title: Less time hunting for worksheets. More time teaching.
hero.lead: A library of beautiful, organized, print-ready learning activities — made for people who believe learning should feel special.
hero.note: A4 PDFs · ink-friendly, works in black & white · print as often as your class needs

tagline.text: Worksheets kids actually enjoy. Materials teachers love to use.

problem.title: How many evenings have you lost searching for one decent worksheet?
pains: Hours of scrolling to find a single usable PDF
Blurry scans, crooked layouts, cluttered pages
The same recycled ideas over and over
Dark backgrounds that drain your ink cartridge
Random files with no organization or sequence
A whole evening of prep for a twenty-minute activity
problem.solution: That is why we built Educa4Good: to turn hours of searching into minutes of choosing.

categories.title: A library built for teaching
categories.lead: Activities crafted with pedagogical and typographic care, organized by skill so you can find what you need fast.

teachers.title: You teach. We help you prepare.
teachers.lead: Planning a good lesson is demanding enough. Finding and formatting worksheets should not eat the rest of your evening.
benefits: Find an activity for the exact skill you are teaching, in minutes
Visually consistent materials that feel like one coherent workbook
Answer keys ready for quick marking
Print for the whole class, as many times as you need
Enough variety to revisit a skill without repeating the same sheet

families.title: Learning happens at home, too
families.lead: Homework support, school breaks, a rainy Sunday: there is always a good moment to learn through play — with paper, pencil and your company.
benefits: Simple instructions that are easy to follow along
Gentle practice of reading, writing and math
Small study rituals that grow into habits
Quality time together — the worksheet is just the start of the conversation
families.note: These activities complement school — they do not replace teachers.

offline.title: Screen off. Curiosity on.
offline.lead: A printed page invites a child to write, draw, cut, color — and proudly show the result. It is hands-on focus, with room for grown-ups to join in.
points: Handwriting at the right size for small hands
Side-by-side learning you can be part of
Keep the sheets and watch progress over time

testimonials.title: Stories from people who teach with Educa4Good

items.q: What do I receive after purchase?
items.a: You receive the activity collection as PDFs, organized by category, with the matching answer keys, as described in the offer at the time of purchase.

items.q: Are the activities digital or physical?
items.a: They are digital PDF files in A4 format, made for you to print wherever you prefer — at home, at school or at a print shop.

items.q: Can I print as many times as I want?
items.a: Yes. The license allows you to print as many copies as you need for use with your own class or family, under the terms of use.

items.q: Can I use them with my students?
items.a: Absolutely — the activities were designed for the classroom. Teachers may print for their own classes.
No. The PDFs are licensed to the buyer. Sharing, reselling or posting the files online is not allowed — that is what keeps the project alive.
The focus is preschool through the early elementary years — generally ages 4 to 8, with age guidance on the activities.

items.q: Do I need to install any software?
items.a: No. Any PDF reader will do, and one is already installed on most computers and phones.

items.q: Do the activities work in black and white?
items.a: Yes. Every layout is designed to stay beautiful and legible when printed in black and white.

items.q: Are there activities in other languages?
items.a: The current catalog is in Portuguese. English and Spanish editions are in preparation — the activities were architected with that in mind.
Yes, the library grows continuously. How you access updates depends on the plan available at the time of purchase.

final.title: A good worksheet can turn a few minutes into a discovery.
final.lead: Bring more possibilities to your classroom, your home, and every child's learning.

footer.tagline: Education that inspires. Learning can be beautiful; teaching can be simpler.
footer.made: Made with care — and with LaTeX.

activities.hero_lead: A showcase of real pages from the collection. Use the filters to browse by category — and remember this is only a sample of the catalog.

how.hero_lead: From the catalog to a child's desk in three simple steps.
how.receive_lead: A4 PDF files with book-quality typography, vector icons and answer keys — ready for any printer.

teachers.hero_lead: Less time formatting sheets, more time with your class.
teachers.body: Every activity is born from a clear pedagogical mechanic — matching, sorting, ordering, completing, comparing — and typeset with the same typography and visual structure. The result feels like one coherent workbook, not a patchwork of random PDFs.

families.hero_lead: Learning moments at home, at your child's pace.
families.body: You do not need to be an expert to follow along: instructions are short and direct, written for the child. Pick an activity, print it together and let curiosity lead. When it is done, it deserves a spot on the fridge.

about.hero_lead: A library of learning activities built with a teacher's eye and an editor's care.
body: Educa4Good was born from a simple observation: preparing good activities takes time — and materials that are beautiful, organized and pedagogically honest are rarer than they should be.

Behind the project there is an unusual level of craft: every page is typeset in LaTeX, the same typographic system used for books and scientific publishing. That is why spacing is consistent, letterforms are the right size for each age, and pages print cleanly even in black and white.
Activities are organized by skill, aligned where possible with Brazil's national curriculum (BNCC), and produced as a living library: new mechanics and themes join the catalog continuously.
The name says it all: education for good. Accessible materials, made with care, for those who teach and those who learn.

contact.hero_lead: Questions, special requests or partnerships? Talk to us.
contact.email_pending: Contact channel being set up — the project's business email will appear here soon.

terms.hero_lead: A short, transparent version — no unnecessary legalese.

sections.p: This site presents the Educa4Good activity library. The site's texts, images and visual identity belong to the project and may not be reproduced without permission.

Purchased activities are licensed for personal use or use with your own class: you may print as many copies as you need in that context. Reselling, redistributing digitally, sharing in groups or posting the files online is not permitted.
Pricing, delivery and refund conditions are those stated by the payment platform at the time of purchase.

privacy.hero_lead: Respect for your data, kept simple.

sections.p: This site uses no tracking cookies of its own and requires no account to browse. Your language preference is stored only in your browser (localStorage).
Payments are processed by external platforms (such as Gumroad or similar), which have their own privacy policies. We do not store card data.
Messages sent by email are used only to reply to you.
